channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-10 01:19 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Democracy without secure elections is not democracy at all
item.description: Democracy without secure elections is not democracy at all

item.title: @elonmusk: I was in the middle of saying “as a born and raised New Yorker, we welcome everyone into this city” ...
item.description: I was in the middle of saying “as a born and raised New Yorker, we welcome everyone into this city” when he threw that over my head.

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Grok just hit a new all time high in daily active users. 🔥 More and more people are switch...
item.description: BREAKING: Grok just hit a new all time high in daily active users. 🔥 More and more people are switching to Grok. The growth keeps accelerating. 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: This is by FAR the clearest footage we have seen of the man who lit the bomb, dropped it at an offic...
item.description: This is by FAR the clearest footage we have seen of the man who lit the bomb, dropped it at an officer's feet and fled. It happens so fast it's hard to see, so I've slowed the footage and added arrows so you can see it. He literally drops it RIGHT AT the feet of an officer.

item.title: @elonmusk: Try the “extend video” feature of@GrokImagine. You can make a whole story.
item.description: Try the “extend video” feature of@GrokImagine. You can make a whole story.

item.title: @elonmusk: Being used a footstool by a homicidal maniac probably didn’t change that libtard’s suicidal empathy ...
item.description: Being used a footstool by a homicidal maniac probably didn’t change that libtard’s suicidal empathy views at all. Death of the West is what they all want.

item.title: @elonmusk: This is just Grok Imagine 1.0. V1.5 is a major upgrade.
item.description: This is just Grok Imagine 1.0. V1.5 is a major upgrade.

item.title: @elonmusk: They both need to be in prison
item.description: They both need to be in prison

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
